title: coleus laxiflorus
intro: Coleus laxiflorus, also known as Coleus, is a plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Coleus laxiflorus include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected areas.
